Title: Eligibility Must Be Satisfied
Input/Action: POST /applications/ with student meeting all criteria (CPI >= min, no backlogs)
Expected Result: Application accepted; record created

Title: Eligibility Must Be Satisfied
Input/Action: POST /applications/ with student CPI below scholarship minimum_cgpa
Expected Result: Rejected with eligibility error; no application created

Title: No Duplicate Applications
Input/Action: POST /mcm-applications/ as student with no prior MCM application
Expected Result: Application created; HTTP 201

Title: No Duplicate Applications
Input/Action: POST /mcm-applications/ as student who already has an MCM application
Expected Result: Rejected; duplicate application error

Title: Use of Previously Uploaded Documents
Input/Action: POST /mcm-applications/ with document link URLs (previously uploaded)
Expected Result: Application accepted with existing document links

Title: Use of Previously Uploaded Documents
Input/Action: POST /student/submit/mcm/ without income_certificate file
Expected Result: Rejected; income certificate file is required

Title: Application Completeness Validation
Input/Action: POST /mcm-applications/ with all required fields filled
Expected Result: Application created; HTTP 201

Title: Application Completeness Validation
Input/Action: POST /mcm-applications/ with required fields missing (e.g., student_full_name=blank)
Expected Result: Rejected with validation error listing missing fields

Title: Application Review Access
Input/Action: GET /mcm-applications/ as user with spacsassistant designation
Expected Result: All applications returned; access granted

Title: Application Review Access
Input/Action: GET /mcm-applications/ as student (sees only own applications, not all)
Expected Result: Only student's own applications returned; cannot see others

Title: Draft Save on Timeout or Error
Input/Action: POST /mcm-applications/ with partial data to save initial application
Expected Result: Application record persisted with submitted data

Title: Draft Save on Timeout or Error
Input/Action: POST /mcm-applications/ with completely empty required fields
Expected Result: Validation error; no application created

Title: Notification on Status Change
Input/Action: PATCH /mcm-applications/<pk>/ changing status from pending to verified (triggers notification logic)
Expected Result: Status changed; notification attempt triggered in service layer

Title: Notification on Status Change
Input/Action: GET /mcm-applications/<pk>/ (read-only, no status change)
Expected Result: No notification triggered; status unchanged

Title: Withdrawal Before Review
Input/Action: Student views own pending application (pre-review, status=pending)
Expected Result: Application visible; status indicates pre-review state

Title: Withdrawal Before Review
Input/Action: Student attempts status change on application in verified/approved state
Expected Result: Blocked; cannot modify applications past review stage

Title: Only Owner Can Edit or Withdraw the Application
Input/Action: PATCH /mcm-applications/<pk>/ as the application owner (student who created it)
Expected Result: Modification accepted (if status allows)

Title: Only Owner Can Edit or Withdraw the Application
Input/Action: PATCH /mcm-applications/<pk>/ as a different student (not the owner)
Expected Result: Application not in queryset; cannot modify

Title: Download/Print Access Control
Input/Action: GET /mcm-applications/<pk>/ as the owning student
Expected Result: Application data returned; HTTP 200

Title: Download/Print Access Control
Input/Action: GET /mcm-applications/<pk>/ as non-owner student
Expected Result: Empty queryset or no data; cannot access others' applications

Title: Escalation & SLA for Reviews
Input/Action: PATCH /mcm-applications/<pk>/ status=verified within SLA (convener acting on verified)
Expected Result: Status changed normally; no escalation needed

Title: Escalation & SLA for Reviews
Input/Action: Convener attempts to act on non-verified application
Expected Result: Blocked; convener can only act on verified applications

Title: Catalog Versioning & Published Source of Truth
Input/Action: POST /applications/ referencing an ExtendedScholarshipType with is_active=True
Expected Result: Application accepted; uses active catalogue entry

Title: Catalog Versioning & Published Source of Truth
Input/Action: POST /applications/ referencing an ExtendedScholarshipType with is_active=False
Expected Result: Rejected; scholarship is no longer active
